name: openreplay
description: Query and explore your replays and analytics.
long_description: Query your OpenReplay data using natural language. Search and replay user sessions, and build interactive cards to track trends, explore web analytics, map user journeys, catch drop-offs with funnels, and monitor web vitals, errors, and slow queries.

app_url.title: OpenReplay URL
app_url.description: Your OpenReplay instance URL — the address you visit in your browser.
